choices: Yes and has Bart drop her off at the airport
1.content:
As Bart, Lisa, Maggie, and their parents watch old family videos, Lisa stumbles across Bart's Ads when he was a little kid. When all of a sudden halfway Marge accidentally says that their got paid from the commercials, but once Bart finds out what happened to the money he quickly disowned his family and walked out the door. A few days later Homer and Marge get a letter in the mail stating that Bart is suing Homer and getting a court order to remove his parents of legal guardianship.

Meanwhile after a few months have passed. Maggie is in preschool and doing great. One day she decided to show Lisa, Marge, and Homer. What she learned from preschool, and so Maggie first asks Lisa to listen to her sing the alphabet. Lisa says I would love to hear you sing them Maggie. So and Maggie starts singing them in front of Lisa who's recording it so she can send it to Bart.

When all of a sudden just as Maggie gets to the letter p, she stops singing. So Lisa asks Maggie what's wrong and why did you stop at the letter p. When all of a sudden before Maggie could answer Lisa, Lisa said is it because you started thinking of words that start with letter p. Yes Lisa and here are the ones I came up with, but instead of just saying the words. She puts them in a sentence that causes Lisa to immediately pick her up and bring her to the bathroom.

Lisa I stopped singing because I have to pee on the potty. So as Lisa picks up Maggie, she says that was a very good job and thanks for telling me that you have to pee on the potty. Hey Maggie you can finish the alphabet song while you go pee pee on the potty. Wow Maggie you're just as smart as me. Now how about you show mom how smart her baby girl is becoming.

So after Maggie is done with peeing on the potty, Lisa helps Maggie empty her potty into the toilet. They then flush it together before washing their hands. Once they're done in the bathroom they head back to Maggie's room. When they get there they find mom going through old family albums. Hey mom do you want hear Maggie's alphabet song. Sure I do Lisa and Maggie, and so Maggie sings the whole alphabet. Wow Maggie you did the whole song on the first shot.

Say Maggie when was the last time you visited the potty, before I came to sing the alphabet to you mommy. Wow Maggie and how did you tell Lisa that you had to go potty. Well she was sing the alphabet and stopped when she got the letter p, and so I asked her what's wrong. She then told that she stopped singing because she had to pee on the potty.

Well Maggie you just have to sing it for Homer before he leaves the house. So Lisa and Maggie go downstairs, and Maggie asks Homer if she can sing the alphabet for him. Homer just says I'm sorry Maggie but I gotta run. This makes Maggie upset and so she runs outside and up into Bart's treehouse. Homer Simpson you just upset Maggie. Now go talk to her, but Marge I don't even know why she's upset with me.

Homer yes Lisa it's because you blew her off when all she wanted was for you to listen to her sing the alphabet. When all of a sudden Lisa's phone rings. Hey sis! Omg Bart how are you doing, I'm doing fine but Milhouse texted me saying he saw Maggie crying her way into my treehouse. Is Milhouse playing a joke on me sis, not this time Bart. In fact I'm going to talk with Maggie right now. Hey sis put me on speaker phone once up in the treehouse, I will Bart.

So just as promised Lisa puts Bart on speaker phone as she climbs into the treehouse. Hey Lisa Maggie says who are you on the phone with. I'm talking to Bart who found out about you going into his treehouse and he's not mad at you. Do you really mean it Lisa that Bart's not mad that I broke the no girls allowed rule.

When all of a sudden yes Maggie I'm not mad at you because one your mine and Lisa's baby sister and two I know how you feel about Homer not paying attention to you. Thanks Bart for understanding my situation but am I going to do to get Homer to realize just how bad he upset me. Well to totally honest with you Maggie, there's only a few people that can set Homer straight.

Um ok Bart but who are you talking about, I'm talking about the fact that only Ned, mom, and Moe can get Homer to start paying attention to you immediately but only if you feel that you're ready to talk to Homer again. Thanks Bart but I'm to upset right now to stay in Springfield, and I promise I'll call you, Lisa, and mom when I find a temporary home.

Wow Lisa first me and now Maggie, and I hope Homer doesn't do it to you Lisa. O before I go sis you accidentally sent the whole video of Maggie singing the alphabet and then getting rejected by Homer to Milhouse. Oops I didn't mean to do that Bart, I know you didn't and that's why I called you. Hey Maggie nice job and you two are right Maggie is smart like Lisa.

Wow Maggie everyone but Homer, liked listening to you sing the alphabet. Say Maggie where are you going to live if not in Springfield, well if you and Bart can keep it a secret. I'm going to find Quahog and then find the Griffin's house and live with Stewie until someone gets to Homer's peanut sized brain and knocks some sense into it.

So with that said Maggie and Lisa got off the phone with Bart and left the treehouse for their own room. So as the rest of the day went forward Maggie continues being upset with Homer. So after dinner Marge says Homer I'm very worried that Maggie is going to run away just like how Bart moved out a few months, and also worried that what you did to upset them might happen to Lisa.

You're crazy Marge to think that Maggie is going to run away from home. When you know that she relies on us for everything. Um you mean she relies on me and sometimes her big brother and sister. Meanwhile as Homer and Marge are still talking about who's right when it comes to Maggie running away.

Maggie is busy packing enough of her stuff to last her until she reaches her destination. Lisa peeks her head into Maggie's room and says wow you're really going to run away huh Maggie. O Lisa I didn't even notice you but yes I'm running away in the middle of the night. Does Maggie stop by Bart's apartment on her way to the Griffin's house in Quahog?
1.title: Bart finds out about money he made for commercials

11.content:
Bart sweetie I brought you some food and want to see how my little man is doing all by himself. When all of a sudden he looked out the window and saw a moving van, was here with some of his furniture or did his mom want to baby him or did sisters move out and came with mom to move in with Bart?

(a) mom drove the moving van and in had all the rest of Bart's stuff from his room and treehouse.
(b) it was filled with supplies to child prof his apartment in case she needed to have Maggie and Lisa stay there.
(c) it was filled with all Lisa's and Maggie's stuff and furniture.
11.title: (a)

111.content:
Well I also came drop off the rest of your stuff, o thanks mom. Here take this and have Homer sign it no questions asked. So with that said his mom hugs him before leaving. When all of a sudden just as he goes to open one of the boxes he hears people yelling surprise. Who are they?

(a) his sisters
(b) Milhouse and Nelson
(c) Milhouse, Nelson, and his sisters
111.title: (a)

112.content:
Um mom yes sweetie what's with all the supplies to child proff my apartment. Well it's obviously not for you Bart but instead if we decide to drop your sisters off I'll feel safe knowing that they won't get hurt. O well in that case there's an empty room that you can put the extras in. What happens next?

(a) Maggie and Lisa climb out of one of the boxes. Mom did you accidentally pack my sisters in a box.
(b) Bart says pee-yew what did you pack in this box. When all of a sudden they find Maggie with a poopy pull up. Mom did you accidentally pack Maggie in a box.
(c) Bart opens one of the boxes and inside is Lisa's saxophone. When all of a sudden Lisa pops out of the box next to the one Bart just opened. Mom did you accidentally pack Lisa in a box.
112.title: (b)

113.content:
Mom why are you moving Lisa's and Maggie's stuff into my apartment. Um I'm afraid to tell but your sisters miss you so much that they don't want to stay at home, and want to live with you. How does Bart react to sisters wanting to live with him?

(a) he says that they can move in.
(b) no they can't move in but they can sleepover.
(c) they can only stay when they need to be babysat.
113.title: (c)

12.content:
Bart we miss you at home and are sick of Homer trying to make us be his slaves by sending us here to bring you I'm sorry gifts and cakes. Also mom won't let us out of her sight. I did what you did and have a legal document to make you have legal guardianship over me and Maggie. When all of a sudden he looked out the window and saw of moving van. Wow Lisa for a second there I thought you were joking until I saw the moving van unloading your and Maggie's stuff and furniture. What happens next after he helps sisters move in with him?

(a) they watch their favourite cartoon.
(b) he officially starts being the big brother to his sisters when he suggests that he should probably check Maggie's huggies to see if she needs a change.
(c) he has Homer's credit card on hand and him and his little sisters buy whatever they want with it. He knows that Homer took out a loan from the mob with that same credit card.
12.title: (b)

121.content:
Hey I know how we can relax and take our mind off of how Homer treated us, by watching our favorite cartoon. So Bart, Lisa, and Maggie sit down to watch their favorite cartoon in Bart's entertainment room on a ridiculously huge smart tv. When all of a sudden Maggie has to go ______. What does Maggie do next?

(a) a big girl and goes to use the toilet by herself.
(b) Tells her siblings she has to go potty.
(c) is too busy laughing with her siblings at their favorite cartoon characters. That she wets her pull up, and starts crying about it.
121.title: (a)

122.content:
Hey Lisa yes Bart can you go and grab Maggie's diaper bag, while I check her huggies. Um sure I can Bart but you should know by now that she's not in diapers anymore, yes I know that Lisa it's just that mom bought huggies pull ups for Maggie. O oops I forgot that mom is a huggies products fan. What does Bart find out when he checks Maggie's huggies, and how does she react?

(a) pee-yew Maggie you need a new huggies pull up, um ok Bart but I think I have to pee now.
(b) awe Maggie you wet your huggies pull up and need a new huggies pull up, um ok Bart but I think I have to poop now.
(c) wow Maggie how did you manage to keep your huggies pull up dry and clean, um Bart maybe you should take me to the bathroom.
122.title: (b)

123.content:
Hey Maggie and Lisa look what I have. Omg Bart is that Homer's credit card, yes it is since he blew all the money that should have been mine. I figured I would go on a spending spree, and you two have moved in with me I might as well let you two join me. What happens next?
(a) the three of them buy a million dollars worth of stuff.
(b) travel the world.
(c) buy a yacht and take everyone except Homer on it for a nice party cruise.
123.title: (c)

choices: They all watch their favorite cartoon
They all watch their favorite cartoon and unpack Maggie's belongings
Unpack first then they watch their favorite cartoon
13.content:
Well here's Bart's apartment building, and so Maggie rings the door bell. Ay caramba! Maggie you weren't joking about running away. I'll let you in so we can talk, o thank you Bart but can you hurry. O in that case I'll meet you downstairs. So Bart quickly grabs his keys and runs downstairs to the first floor. Once on the first floor he asks the manager to get someone to carry his sister's belongings inside for them.

He then immediately picks Maggie up and runs to the first floor restroom. As Bart is carrying her to the restroom, Maggie says I didn't even explain why I needed you to hurry. You didn't have to Maggie because I know that there's no way anyone could make it from our house to my apartment building without needing to use the restroom.

So once inside the restroom Bart wastes no time in helping Maggie onto the toilet. He waits outside the stall with the door unlocked so that he can quickly get to her if needed. So a few minutes later Maggie is all done going potty, and so she flushed the toilet. She then walks out of the stall and Bart takes her over to the sink to wash her hands.

Once they're done in the restroom, they go to grab her belongings to bring up to his apartment. Hey where's my sister's belongings, o we had them brought up to your apartment while you two were in the restroom. Ok thanks guys now I got to get my sister Maggie to my apartment so she can rest a little.

Hey Bart that's one cute sister you got there, o thanks but she's my second sister. You never know my first sister might stop by one day if our father does the same thing again but to Lisa. So Bart and Maggie get on the elevator and go up to his apartment. Well this is my apartment Maggie Bart said as they got off the elevator. When all of a sudden they open the door to his apartment. Milhouse! How and when did you get into my apartment. Um the same time Maggie's belongings were brought up Bart and Maggie.

Wait a second didn't you say that you got a weekend job at an apartment building Milhouse, um yes Bart but what's that got to do with how I got in your apartment. Hey Maggie yes Bart do you want to take it from here, sure I'd love to take it from here Bart. I know exactly how you got in here the same time my belongings got brought in here, it's because your weekend job is a bell hopper for this apartment building. So when Bart asked the manager to get someone to bring my belongings up to his apartment, they sent you to do it.

Dang Maggie you're smart like Lisa, and yes that's exactly what my weekend job is Maggie and Bart. Say Milhouse don't you need to be back on the first floor. Well actually Maggie and Bart my shift was almost over, when Maggie showed up. Wow so your done for the day and can hang out with us, yes I can Maggie and how about we watch some itchy and scratchy now. What happens next?
13.title: Yes and has Bart drop her off at the airport

choices: In the morning Milhouse makes it to the apartment building to say goodbye to her
In the morning Milhouse texted Bart as Bart is helping Maggie I'll miss Maggie
131.content:
Wow Maggie that's all you brought with you, is some pull ups, baby wipes, baby lotion, your potty, and some of Lisa's old toddler clothes. Well yes Bart and Milhouse because I'm not planning on staying in Springfield I just stopped here for the night, and so that tomorrow morning Bart can get me on a plane to Quahog.

Um I'm confused Bart why does Maggie want to get on a plane and fly to a different city. Milhouse remember when Griffin's were staying with my family, yes I do Bart but why's that important. Milhouse don't you get it Maggie is running away to Quahog to stay with the Griffin's. Bart's right Milhouse that's exactly where I'm headed off to in the morning, but Bart forgot one major detail. What's that Maggie, it's the one about whoes room I'll be sleeping in. I know exactly which one you're talking about Maggie, and it's Stewie's room isn't it. Yes that's exactly where I'll be sleeping Bart.

Well goodnight Bart and Milhouse, ok goodnight Maggie and Milhouse don't you think you should get home. O right Bart I almost forgot about it. Well if I'm not back here early enough in the morning just tell Maggie that I'll miss her. Um why would you miss her Milhouse. Um probably only Maggie would understand why I'll miss her, but Lisa might also understand why I'll miss her.
131.title: They all watch their favorite cartoon

choices: Quagmire drops her off at the Griffin's so she can surprise Stewie
Surprise Stewie by having the Griffin's pick her up at the airport
1311.content:
The next morning Bart and Maggie wake up and get ready for Maggie to go to the airport. When all of a sudden Milhouse rings the door bell. O hey Milhouse come on up, me and Maggie are just getting her belongings packed up. Hey Maggie here you go, o thanks Milhouse I'll put it on now. Um Milhouse what did you just had Maggie, um I handed her Lisa's pearls Bart. How did you get a hold of Lisa's pearls Milhouse.

I stopped by your family's house Bart and I told Lisa where Maggie was and that she was leaving for Quahog in the morning. So Lisa gave me the pearls and told me to tell Maggie that Lisa will miss her and to give the pearls to her. Wow Maggie it's like we're looking at a younger Lisa. Well we better get going if we're going to make it to our flight to Quahog. Wait Bart I thought you were just going to drop me off at the airport. Originally yes but while you were sleeping, I decided to go with you to Quahog to make sure you got there ok like a big brother should.

So once all Maggie's belongings are packed up, they all go down to the first floor. Once on the first floor Maggie hugs and kisses Milhouse goodbye. They then get on their skateboards and ride them all the way to the airport. Once at the airport Maggie and Bart make their way to their flight to Quahog.

When all of a sudden as they board the plane, Maggie recognizes the pilot. Ay caramba Bart I know that voice, who our pilot Maggie and how do you know the pilot's voice. Hi Quagmire um hi so I see that you and your big brother are flying to my hometown which is Quahog. Yes we are flying to Quahog Quagmire, but sister Maggie hasn't told me how she knew your voice. Wait a second Maggie is it, so your the other baby girl that Stewie Griffin talks about all the time to Brian.

Well remember the time when the Griffin's got stuck in Springfield. Yes I do Maggie and Peter called my cellphone, and he must have accidentally put it on speaker phone. Ay caramba so that's where you know Quagmire's voice from Maggie. Well I guess I know where someone is going once we land in Quahog. Say Maggie I live next door to the Griffin's and so I can take you there, or I could have them pick you up. What does Maggie choose?
1311.title: In the morning Milhouse makes it to the apartme...

choices: Homer isn't home during the conference call but Moe is making him watch the news
Homer is home but Marge tells him that he's unwelcome here until he apologizes
13111.content:
So once they land in Quahog, Quagmire says ok Maggie I'm going to get my car ready while you go and retrieve your belongings. So a few minutes ok Maggie you got everything with you that you brought with you on the plane, yes I got everything thing Bart and I'll call you once I'm settled in at the Griffin's house.

So with that said Bart and Maggie walk out to Quagmire's car, and packed her belongings into the trunk. Well stay safe Maggie and I hope that mom, Ned, and Moe can get Homer to realize just how upset he made you feel. Wow Maggie your father must have really screwed up to make a cute little girl like run this far away from home.

Well you know how parents are supposed pay attention especially when their kid is trying to show them what they learned at school especially preschool. Omg Maggie please don't tell your father didn't pay attention to you when wanted to show him something that you learned at preschool. Yes that's exactly what he did, I was going around showing my sister who had to video me for my brother to see it since he moved out because are father spent the money that Bart got from being in commercial as a little kid.

Wow so what did your father skip out on letting you show him, the alphabet Quagmire. Omg no wonder you run away, because that's just terrible Maggie. Now how about your sister Maggie. Well Homer hasn't done anything to upset her yet, but our said she hated jazz music and the saxophone. Omg Maggie what happened next, well she at least made it up with my sister by taking her on a trip and admitting that she messed up.

Well here we are Maggie the Griffin's house. "Um Stewie yes Brian we got a visitor and it looks like they'll be staying for a while." "Omg Maggie what are you doing in Quahog" I ran away from home with the help from my brother and Quagmire. "Why did you run away from home Maggie", because Homer would listen to me sing the alphabet. " what the deuce is his problem Maggie." O nobody really knows what his problem is Stewie, but a few months ago he upset Bart when found out about what had to the money he made from commercials, and so Bart moved out and has an apartment.

Well I should probably unpack my belongings since I'll probably be here for awhile. When all of a sudden the phone rings, ay caramba Stewie I just remembered I told Bart I'd call him once I got here. Hey Brian yes Stewie can you call this number. Hey Bart I made it to the Griffin's house, o that's wonderful but you need to turn the tv news on.

Maggie turns the tv on and then changes the channel to the news channel. We got breaking news of a little girl who ran away from home. Lets get some live footage of the home she left. Omg Maggie your family's house is on the news. Please if anyone knows where my little Maggie is please report that information to the police station.


Ay caramba Bart you got to text Lisa and tell her to tell mom that I'm safe. Ok Maggie I'll do it while I'm still on the phone with you. Oops I accidentally started the conference call mode and dialed our house. Ay caramba Bart just get Lisa and mom on the phone and if Homer is on the phone with us tell him I'm still upset and not talking directly to him. What happens next?
13111.title: Quagmire drops her off at the Griffin's so ...

choices: Yes but he insisted that he'll sleep on the couch
Yes and Maggie convinces him to sleep with her in her new room
131112.content:
Homer if you don't apologize to Maggie right now than you can stay with grandpa while I get some forms from the courthouse to have Bart and Lisa legal guardians of their sister Maggie and I might as well get one for Lisa so Bart can be her legal guardian too. You're joking Marge you would never trust Bart with taking care of his sisters. Well I don't trust him completely but it's either they be with Bart, grandpa, my sisters, Ned, the van houten's, or even Moe, or I divorce you and raise them myself with Bart helping as needed. Alright fine go ahead and make Bart legal guardian of his sisters.

Almost a year after Bart flew with Maggie to Quahog. Bart gets a letter stating that since your father still hasn't apologized to Maggie, I had the court office make you legal guardian of Lisa because Homer is bound to upset her like he did to you and Maggie. I also had them make you and Lisa Maggie's legal guardians. Hey Lisa yes Bart did mom tell you that I'm your legal guardian and we share legal guardianship over Maggie. Yes she did Bart and I think it's good a idea that she decided to put Maggie's big brother and sister as her legal guardians and you my legal guardian.

Say Bart is Maggie still in Quahog, I think so Lisa because I haven't gone to the airport since took her to Quahog. When all of a sudden hey Lisa yes Bart I gotta get the door, and so I'll call you later. So with that said Bart answers the door. Hey Maggie hey Stewie what brings you two here. Well I'm ready to come back to Springfield but not home, Maggie you are home and Lisa will be home shortly. Wait what do you mean that I'm home and Lisa will be home shortly.

Well remember when I moved out and legally disowned Homer. Yes I do remember that Bart but why's that important. Maggie it's important because mom gave me full legal guardianship over Lisa and I share legal guardianship over you with Lisa. Ay caramba mom must really be mad and upset with Homer. O she is Maggie and she said it was either sign legal guardianship of Lisa over to Bart and sign legal guardianship of Maggie over to Bart and Lisa or she'd divorce him and he'd have to find somewhere else to live.

Wow Bart I never thought mom would do something like this, especially since your only 12yrs old Bart, Lisa is 10yrs old, I'm only 2yrs old. Well she didn't really have that many options Maggie, because it was either move in with me, or get stuck with grandpa, Ned, mom's sisters, Moe, or the Van Houten's. Well she definitely did a good job at making sure all of us are happy, because we both know about Milhouse's crush on Lisa, all three of us can't stand Ned, grandpa, or mom's sisters. Um ok that explains everyone except why not moe. Stewie that's the easiest one to understand he's the owner of a bar and just like how Peter is either at work or the clam, it's the same way with Homer either at work or at Moe's.

Well we should probably let mom know we're all together. Hey Stewie yes Maggie why don't you stay for dinner and some video games. Well I guess I could stay for a little while longer. So as Bart and Lisa are talking to mom Maggie and Stewie unpack her belongings that Lisa brought over into the room where Maggie is sleeping. Does Stewie end up failing asleep?
131112.title: Homer is home but Marge tells him that he's...

132.content:
Hey Bart o hey Homer, here you go Bart. Um Homer won't you, mom, Lisa, and especially Maggie miss Santa's little helper. Well Maggie yes, Lisa maybe, but Santa's little helper was always your dog Bart. How does Bart react to the fact that Maggie and Lisa might never see Santa's little helper?

(a) Bart tells Homer to go give Santa's little helper either to Maggie or Lisa.
(b) Bart asks Homer if he even let Maggie and Lisa know about his decision to give Santa's little helper to their brother.
(c) when all of a sudden Maggie and Lisa walk in carrying all the stuff Bart needs if he's going to have Santa's little helper living with him. Wait a second why do you two have suitcases with you, um we'll tell you once Homer leaves.
132.title: (b)

133.content:
O hey Homer hey Bart your mom and I are going on a cruise and there's nobody else available to watch Maggie and Lisa, and so they'll be staying with you. Wait Homer why didn't mom ask the Van houten's to watch Lisa and Maggie, she did but the only one who happy about it was Maggie. What happens next and does Homer lose legal guardianship of his daughters to his son?

(a) Bart finally accepts that he's their big brother, but it's just temporary.
(b) Bart finally accepts that he's their big brother, and becomes their legal guardian.
(c) Bart doesn't have the option to say no to being his sisters legal guardian, because they already started to move into his apartment.
133.title: (c)

info.brief_description: Bart disowned his family but it's all Homer's fault. What happens back home?
info.description:
The Graphic content rating is mainly there for the child abuse of Bart by being strangled by Homer.

Bart after ten years of getting strangled by the neck by Homer. Decided to move out and legally have his parents no longer responsible to raise him. What happens back home?
info.pretty_title: Bart moves out because of Homer
